name: & Flask~ of oil
desc:
It can be used to fuel a lantern with 7500 turns of light, up to
a maximum of 15000 turns of light.
When thrown, it is considered lit, so it does more than nominal
damage (which occurs even against creatures resistant to fire).

name: & Hard Biscuit~
desc: A filling if tooth-breaking biscuit made mostly of rye.

name: & Apple~
desc: Wrinkled, but sound and sweet.

name: & Handful~ of Dried Fruits
desc:
Fruit roughly chopped and sun-dried, prepared as marching rations for the
rangers of Ithilien.

name: & Slime Mold~
desc:
A strange fungal growth, prone to moving if not observed.  Not very tasty
but quite filling.

name: & Ration~ of Food
desc:
This nutritious but fairly bland food, called cram by the Lake-men who
make it is familiar to anyone contemplating long journeys.  It is
sustaining, but very uninteresting except as a chewing exercise.

name: & Scrap~ of Flesh
desc:
A grey-looking piece of dried flesh of you dare not guess what creature.
You would have to be desperate to eat this.

name: & Slice~ of Meat
desc:
A thick slice of pork, salted to keep it from spoiling.  It is very
filling.

name: & Honey-cake~
desc:
The Beornings are renowned as the best bakers among men, and their
honey-cakes are deservedly prized.  Made of wheat flour with nuts and
honey and twice baked, they will sustain you through a long march.

name: & Piece~ of Elvish Waybread
desc:
Food of the elves is always good; their waybread is no exception.  These
thin cakes are wrapped in leaves and keep their tastiness for months.

name: & Flask~ of Whisky
desc: It raises your spirits.

name: & Pint~ of Fine Wine
msg: That tastes great!  A fine vintage.
desc: A fine way to wash down some otherwise unappetising rations.

name: & Sip~ of Miruvor
desc:
Just a little of this warm and fragrant liquor gives you fresh hope and
vigour.

name: & Swig~ of Orcish Liquor
desc: This is a dirty brown color; you don't trust it.

name: & Draught~ of the Ents
desc:
This looks like pure water, but its scent reminds you of the smell of a
distant wood borne from afar by a cool breeze at night.

name: Terror
desc: It allows you to run for your life.

name: Stoneskin
desc: Its poison turns your skin to stone, albeit briefly.

name: Sprinting
desc: It hastes you for a while, but then makes you slower for a while afterward.

name: Purging
desc: It makes you very hungry but otherwise healthy.

name: Shadows
desc: It makes you very stealthy for a short while.

name: & Dagger~
desc: A short two-edged blade perfect for thrusting or throwing.

name: & Main~ Gauche~
desc: A short thrusting blade with a large guard, primarily used in duels.

name: & Rapier~
desc: A long, thin thrusting blade, mainly used in duels.

name: & Short Sword~
desc: A short thrusting sword.

name: & Cutlass~
desc:
A thicker and slightly longer dagger, the cutlass is a slashing sword.  It
possesses a slight curve and only one side is sharp.

name: & Tulwar~
desc: A wider-bladed cousin of the shamshir, with less of a curve.

name: & Scimitar~
desc: A long sabre with an extreme curve to the blade.

name: & Long Sword~
desc:
A long, straight, two-edged blade, with two hand guards projecting out
from the hilt to form a perfect cross.

name: & Broad Sword~
desc: A heavy, single-edged sword with a strong grip.

name: & Bastard Sword~
desc:
Also known as the hand-and-a-half blade.  A larger-than-normal straight-
sided sword with two cutting edges.

name: & Katana~
desc:
A slightly curved long-handled slashing sword with a single-edged
blade and a chisel tip.

name: & Zweihander~
desc: A sword designed for two hands.

name: & Executioner's Sword~
desc: A giant, curved blade designed to cleave the head cleanly from the body.

name: & Blade~ of Chaos
desc:
This inconstant weapon revels in disorder, hacking and slashing your foes
with bloodthirsty glee.

name: & Whip~
desc:
A heavy whip, this thick coil is thrown from the shoulder and can
knock down a large man.

name: & Ball-and-Chain~
desc: A weighty iron ball, suspended by a chain from a sturdy oaken handle.

name: & Morning Star~
desc:
A sturdy wooden pole connected by a chain to a ball of steel, which often
has projecting spikes.

name: & Flail~
desc:
Two heavy bars of wood connected by a short link of chain, capable of
delivering crushing blows.

name: & Two-Handed Great Flail~
desc:
Two great bars of wood connected by a massive chain, needing two hands
to properly wield.

name: & Mace~
desc: A war club with an iron head, usually flanged or spiked.

name: & Lead-Filled Mace~
desc:
A heavy war club topped with a mass of lead-filled steel, capable of
landing crushing blows.

name: & Quarterstaff~
desc:
Six feet of oak which can be wielded in both hands to give a drubbing or
block one.

name: & Throwing Hammer~
desc: A short-handled iron hammer that can strike hard when thrown.

name: & War Hammer~
desc: A mallet with a tapered head and a long handle.

name: & Maul~
desc: A long-handled hammer with a heavy head.

name: & Great Hammer~
desc: A mighty hammer with a massive head designed to crush and stun.

name: & Mace~ of Disruption
desc:
A giant's weapon, enchanted with shattering power that breaks bones,
bodies, and spirit.

name: & Spear~
desc:
The basic polearm, with a double-edged knife mounted on a light shaft.
This weapon can be thrown effectively.

name: & Awl-Pike~
desc:
A more robust version of the basic polearm, with a double-edged knife
mounted on a sturdy shaft.  It cannot be thrown effectively, but offers
some protection to the wielder.

name: & Trident~
desc: A three-pronged spear, originally for catching fish.

name: & Halberd~
desc:
The most successful of the polearms, the halberd has a long haft mounted
with a heavy axe blade and opposing spike, and topped by a thrusting
spine.

name: & Pike~
desc:
A fifteen foot spear, requiring two hands to wield, principally used in
infantry formations.

name: & Throwing Axe~
desc:
A short-handled hatchet, balanced for throwing.  A classic skirmisher's
weapon.

name: & Beaked Axe~
desc: A narrow axe head opposed by a crow's beak for penetrating armour.

name: & Broad Axe~
desc: A simple, single-bladed war axe capable of chopping though limbs or armour.

name: & Battle Axe~
desc: A double-bladed axe.  Very popular among Dwarves.

name: & Lochaber Axe~
desc: A long shaft with a long narrow blade.

name: & Great Axe~
desc:
An enormous two-handed battle axe, carried by Dwarven champions, who
compete to see who can cleave the most orc heads.

name: & Scythe~
desc:
The long crescent blade stands out from the handle of this
polearm, and it is swung with two hands to harvest grain or blood.

name: & Glaive~
desc:
A reinforced wooden pole eight feet long, topped by a massive knife blade
that can be used to thrust or chop.

name: & Lance~
desc: A massive, tapered spear used primarily from horseback.

name: & Scythe~ of Slicing
desc:
A reaper's weapon, the long blade almost hums in anticipation of
the blood it will spill.

name: & Lucerne Hammer~
desc: A long pole with a three- or four-pronged head balanced by a long spike.

name: & Sling~
desc:
A loop of leather and cords able to hurl stones or shot with
tremendous velocity.

name: & Short Bow~
desc: The traditional hunter's weapon, this light bow is easily drawn.

name: & Long Bow~
desc:
As tall as a man, the longbow can drive an arrow through the
heaviest armour.

name: & Light Crossbow~
desc:
A mechanical bow made of wood, it is cocked to augment the strength
of its wielder.

name: & Heavy Crossbow~
desc:
This arbalest is so powerful it has to be reinforced with metal and
requires a crank to be cocked.

name: & Arrow~
desc: It can be shot with a bow.

name: & Seeker Arrow~
desc: It can be shot with a bow.

name: & Mithril Arrow~
desc: It can be shot with a bow.

name: & Bolt~
desc: It can be shot with a crossbow.

name: & Seeker Bolt~
desc: It can be shot with a crossbow.

name: & Mithril Bolt~
desc: It can be shot with a crossbow.

name: & Rounded Pebble~
desc: It can be shot with a sling or thrown.

name: & Iron Shot~
desc: It can be shot with a sling or thrown.

name: & Mithril Shot~
desc: It can be shot with a sling or thrown.

name: & Shovel~
desc: A compact and sturdy spade.

name: & Pick~
desc:
A heavy mining tool with a long, slightly curved head that tapers
to chisel points on both ends.

name: & Mattock~
desc:
A digging tool with a broad horizontal blade balanced by a smaller
vertical blade.  Used as a weapon of war by dwarves.

name: & Pair~ of Leather Sandals
desc:
A set of open-topped footgear with soft calfskin lacings and a sturdy
cured leather base.

name: & Pair~ of Leather Boots
desc: These are calf-high boots of flexible leather, laced from heel to calf.

name: & Pair~ of Iron Shod Boots
desc:
A set of sturdy leather boots strengthened with iron that will last
many weary miles.

name: & Pair~ of Steel Shod Boots
desc:
A set of double-lined leather boots, with toes and heels reinforced with
steel.

name: & Pair~ of Mithril Shod Boots
desc:
The enduring dwarves make the finest footgear known, and they march in it
for endless miles without wearying.

name: & Pair~ of Ethereal Slippers
desc: Fine quality elvish slippers, hard-wearing but apparently weightless.

name: & Hard Leather Cap~
desc: A padded skullcap of boiled leather.

name: & Metal Cap~
desc: A pot-helm of steel that protects the skull.

name: & Iron Helm~
desc: A mighty helmet of heavy iron, completely enclosing the head.

name: & Steel Helm~
desc:
This great helm covers the head and shoulders with plates of steel and a
curtain of mail.

name: & Iron Crown~
desc:
A plain band of iron, crowned with iron spikes.  It is a tyrant's
symbol.

name: & Golden Crown~
desc:
An elegant golden circlet, with slender spines thrusting upward.
It looks like it should be resting over the brow of a king.

name: & Jewel Encrusted Crown~
desc:
An elaboratedly decorated crown of massive gold, studded with a rainbow
of gems and jewels; worthy of a High King.

name: & Robe~
desc: A practical garment of thick wool or velvet, draping from neck to heels.

name: Soft Leather Armour~
desc: A cuirass of pliable leather, with a thicker leather jack.

name: Studded Leather Armour~
desc: A cuirass of pliable leather studded with metal rivets.

name: Hard Leather Armour~
desc: A boiled leather cuirass and shoulder plates.

name: Leather Scale Mail~
desc:
A tunic and skirt sewn with thick, overlapping scales of hardened
leather.

name: Metal Scale Mail~
desc:
A heavy shirt of overlapping steel scales backed by leather, with
matching skirt and sleeves.

name: Chain Mail~
desc:
A hauberk, leggings, and sleeves of interlocking steel rings, well padded
with leather.

name: Augmented Chain Mail~
desc:
A hauberk, leggings, and sleeves of interlocking steel rings,
strategically reinforced at vital locations with a second layer
of chain, all over a layer of heavy padding.

name: Bar Chain Mail~
desc:
A hauberk, leggings, and sleeves of interlocking steel rings,
reinforced around the shoulders with segmented plates of steel,
all over a layer of heavy padding.

name: Metal Brigandine Armour~
desc:
A stiff suit of armour composed of small metal plates sewn to an
inner layer of heavy canvas, and covered with a second layer of
cloth.

name: Partial Plate Armour~
desc: A steel corselet and vambraces over a skirt and leggings of chain.

name: Metal Lamellar Armour~
desc:
This unusual armour is a surprisingly light suit of laced and
overlapping metal plates.

name: Full Plate Armour~
desc:
A full suit of carefully fitted plates, with hinged joints backed
by chain, and light padding underneath.

name: Ribbed Plate Armour~
desc:
A full suit of finely fitted metal armour consisting of steel plates
with reinforced ridging.

name: Mithril Chain Mail~
desc: This wondrous suit of fine-linked chain shimmers as though of pure silver.

name: Mithril Plate Mail~
desc:
A shimmering suit of true-silver, forged long ago by dwarven smiths of
legend.  It gleams with purest white as you gaze upon it.

name: Adamantite Plate Mail~
desc: An exquisite suit of nearly impenetrable adamantite.

name: & Cloak~
desc: A traveller's sturdy outer garment.

name: & Fur Cloak~
desc: A heavy cloak made from fur and lined with leather; a luxury.

name: & Elven Cloak~
desc:
A mantle made of curious silken material by the Galadrim that wondrously
takes on the hues and shapes of its surroundings.

name: & Ethereal Cloak~
desc:
This unearthly, completely transparent body mantle folds and drapes in
iridescent patterns around you.  It weighs absolutely nothing.

name: & Set~ of Leather Gloves
desc: Leather hand protection, with an open palm for gripping weapons.

name: & Set~ of Gauntlets
desc: A set of gloves that completely covers the hand and wrist in steel plating.

name: & Set~ of Mithril Gauntlets
desc: A set of gauntlets wrought of light, shining mithril.

name: & Set~ of Caestus
desc:
An ancient battle glove designed for hand-to-hand fighting.  Its layered
leather thongs are enhanced for combat by bloody-looking spikes.

name: & Set~ of Alchemist's Gloves
desc: Highly protective gloves designed for an alchemist's elemental magics.

name: & Wicker Shield~
desc: A light circular frame of wood surrounding fine-grained wickerwork.

name: & Small Metal Shield~
desc: A round shield of wood reinforced with metal rims and central disk.

name: & Leather Shield~
desc:
A large oval shield made of layered wooden strips with a thick leather
covering.

name: & Large Metal Shield~
desc:
An oval shield of wood covered by leather and rimmed with metal.  A large
iron shield boss offers excellent hand protection.

name: & Knight's Shield~
desc:
A kite-shaped shield with rounded corners that covers the wearer from
chest to toe, emblazoned with heraldic symbols.

name: & Mithril Shield~
desc: A shield of purest white, made of mithril.

name: Damage
desc: It boosts your to-dam value.

name: Accuracy
desc: It boosts your to-hit value.

name: Slaying
desc: It boosts your to-hit and to-dam values.

name: Protection
desc: It increases your armor class.

name: Aggravate Monster
msg: There is a high pitched humming noise.

name: Trap Creation
msg: You hear a low-pitched whistling sound.

name: Life
msg: You feel life flow through your body!

name: Light
vis-msg: A line of shimmering blue light appears.

name: Light
vis-msg: A line of shimmering blue light appears.

name: Black Dragon Scale Mail~
desc: A suit of utterly black scales, against which no metal or wood can rest.

name: Blue Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales as blue as sapphires, emitting eerie sparks and coronas
as you move about in it.

name: White Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales, coldly gleaming in frosty white.  A shiver runs down
through your spine even as you look at it.

name: Red Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales, with all the reds of every fire ever lit.  The scar
tissue from an old burn aches as you put this armour on.

name: Green Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales, glistening in sickly green, out from which falls the
skeleton of a rat who touched it and died in agony.

name: Multi-Hued Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales that throbs with angry energies; it takes all your energy
to master the Elements fighting an endless war trapped inside.

name: Shining Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales shining like a beacon of Light even as it greedily sucks
the energy away from everything that glows into Dark insatiate.

name: Law Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales in stern blue and silver.  You feel the slightest tremor
as you touch it, like massed trumpets heard and cyclones felt from afar.

name: Gold Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales in mirror-like gold.  You hear nothing unusual as you
wear this armour, yet your ears ache as though in the midst of a
cacophony.

name: Chaos Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales that ripples and twists through every color and shape
imaginable as you stare in fascination.

name: Balance Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit of scales.  Featureless grey to casual inspection, yet a closer
look reveals patterns within patterns of iridescence that throb with
leashed energies bound as though by chains of adamant.

name: Power Dragon Scale Mail~
desc:
A suit with scales of every color, surrounded in a nimbus of perfectly
untrammelled yet inextricably intermingled and utterly mastered powers
elemental and ethereal.
